1000674455.english: Hey, it's not dodging — I'm getting to the point, okay?
1000674455.korean: 어허, 말 돌리는 게 아니라 본론으로 들어가는 거거든?

1000674456.english: Sekhmet and I are similar height, but our builds are very different...
1000674456.korean: 세크메트랑 나는 키가 비슷하지만 체형이 많이 차이가 나니까...

1000674457.english: We should slow the rhythm down and arrange mostly easy moves.
1000674457.korean: 박자를 좀 늦추고, 쉬운 동작들 위주로 짜면 되겠다.

1000674458.english: Want to try moving roughly like this? Front, front, back, back, left, right, left, right...
1000674458.korean: 대충 이렇게 움직여 볼래? 앞, 앞, 뒤, 뒤, 좌, 우, 좌, 우...

1000674459.english: Front, back, left, right, left, back...?
1000674459.korean: 앞, 뒤, 좌, 우, 좌, 뒤...?

1000674461.english: I don't think it suits me at all.
1000674461.korean: 저랑은 영 맞지 않는 것 같습니다.

1000674462.english: Hmm, I made it as simple as possible... too bad.

1000674463.english: Phew... dancing is so hard. Should I give up?
1000674463.korean: 후우... 춤은 너무 어렵군요. 포기해야 하는 걸까요?

1000674464.english: No! Don't give up — try it! It's hard when you start dancing, but it becomes fun if you keep at it!
1000674464.korean: 아니야! 포기하지 말고 도전해 봐! 춤을 처음 시작하는 건 어렵지만, 하다 보면 즐거우니까!

1000674465.english: And it doesn't have to be an idol dance — another kind of dance would be fine too, right?
1000674465.korean: 그리고, 굳이 아이돌 춤이 아니라 다른 춤이라도 괜찮지 않겠어?

1000674466.english: Another kind of dance — like what...?

1000674467.english: Well, um... Griffon mentioned some dance club before...
1000674467.korean: 으음, 그러니까... 저번에 그리폰이 무슨 댄스 클럽 얘기를 했는데...

1000674468.english: Oh, Sunny's dance class, you mean?
1000674468.korean: 아, 써니가 운영하는 댄스 교실 말이야?

1000674469.english: Indeed... that might be better. Want me to introduce you?
1000674469.korean: 확실히... 그 쪽이 더 나을 수도 있겠네. 내가 소개해줄까?

1000674471.english: Yes, please. I can't give up over something this small.
1000674471.korean: 네, 부탁드립니다. 겨우 이 정도로 포기할 수는 없지요.

1000674472.english: There's someone I absolutely want to show it to.

1000674473.english: Hmm... I understand that feeling well too.
1000674473.korean: 흐음... 나도 그 마음 잘 알지.

1000674474.english: Alright, then... go this way and enter the room between these corridors.
1000674474.korean: 좋아, 그럼... 여기로 가서, 이 통로 사이에 있는 방으로 들어가면 돼.

1000674475.english: Ooh, it feels like a secret society.

1000674476.korean: 뭐, 딱히 비밀 같은 건 아니지만...

1000674477.english: On the Orca, places suitable for dancing are pretty limited, right?
1000674477.korean: 오르카 호에는 춤을 출 만한 공간이 좀 한정적이잖아?

1000674478.english: You need a wide space, soundproofing, and good ventilation.
1000674478.korean: 넓은 공간도 필요하고, 방음도 좀 되고, 환기까지 잘 되어야 하는데.

1000674479.english: This place was picked after searching for somewhere that meets all those conditions.
1000674479.korean: 그 모든 조건을 충족하는 곳을 찾아 고르고 고른 결과물이지.

1000674480.english: Hmm... certainly, this should meet all the conditions you mentioned.
1000674480.korean: 흐음... 확실히, 이 정도라면 말씀하신 조건을 모두 충족할 수 있을 것 같군요.

1000674481.english: Thank you. I'll study hard and learn a dance that can capture His Majesty's heart.
1000674481.korean: 감사합니다. 열심히 배워서, 폐하의 마음을 사로잡을 수 있는 춤을 익히겠습니다.

1000674483.english: I couldn't really get it when you explained it, but seeing it in person I understand why you were worried.
1000674483.korean: 말로 할 때에는 이해가 잘 안 됐는데, 직접 보니까 왜 걱정하는지 알겠네.

1000674485.english: Liking and loving the Commander isn't a problem...
1000674485.korean: 사령관님을 좋아하고, 사랑하는 건 문제가 없지만...

1000674486.english: but if love becomes blind devotion... that's a problem.

1000674487.english: Sekhmet only slept three hours again today to prepare the Commander's breakfast.
1000674487.korean: 세크메트는 사령관님의 아침 식사를 위해, 오늘도 세 시간 밖에 자지 않았답니다.

1000674488.english: Worrying about the Commander's routine while neglecting her own life...
1000674488.korean: 사령관님의 생활 패턴을 걱정하면서, 정작 자기 생활은 챙기고 있지 않으니...

1000674489.english: I hope this helps her carve out some time for herself.
1000674489.korean: 이번 일을 계기로 자기만의 시간을 가질 수 있게 되면 좋겠네요.

1000674491.english: Cerestia really does take good care of the people around her.
1000674491.korean: 확실히 세레스티아는 주변 사람들을 참 열심히 챙긴단 말이지.

1000674492.english: You should learn from her a bit.

1000674494.english: Hehe, don't be too hard on him. Squad Leader Sleipnir also secretly takes care of those around him.
1000674494.korean: 후후, 너무 그러지 마세요. 슬레이프니르 전대장도 몰래몰래 주변 사람들을 챙기고 있으니까요.

1000674499.english: Last night, you sent a letter to Commander's box asking to stock the cosmetics Lindwurm had been looking for at the canteen.
1000674499.korean: 저번 새벽에 몰래 린트블룸 씨가 찾고 있는 화장품을 매점에 추가해달라고...

1000674500.english: You slipped an anonymous letter didn't you?

1000674502.english: Wait, how did you find that out?

1000674503.english: Hehe... I have my ways of knowing everything.

1000674504.english: Then, I have something to talk to Elven about, so I'll be off...
1000674504.korean: 그럼, 전 엘븐과 나눌 말이 있어서, 이만...

1000674506.english: That gave me a bit of chills...

1000674507.english: Well... it'll be fine. They're not doing anything bad anyway.
1000674507.korean: 뭐... 괜찮겠지. 나쁜 짓을 하는 것도 아니니까.

1000674508.english: I hope things work out well on Sekhmet's side.
1000674508.korean: 세크메트 씨 쪽 일이나 잘 풀렸으면 좋겠네.

1000674510.english: So you said you came to me because you wanted to learn to dance?
1000674510.korean: 그래서, 춤을 배우고 싶어서 절 찾아오셨다는 말이죠?

1000674511.english: Then you've come to the right place!

1000674512.english: This conversation feels kind of déjà vu...?

1000674514.english: ...Never mind. I hope the result is different this time.

1000674515.english: So, what kind of dance will Sunny teach?
1000674515.korean: 그래서, 써니 씨가 가르쳐 주실 춤은 무슨 춤인가요?

1000674517.english: Wouldn't belly dance be too fast?

1000674518.english: No, besides the American style, there are also slow versions of the dance.
1000674518.korean: 아니에요, 아메리칸 스타일 외에도, 천천히 추는 춤도 있는걸요.

1000674519.english: I'll show you the vibe with a video. Now... how is it?
1000674519.korean: 어떤 느낌인지는, 영상으로 보여드릴게요. 자... 어떠세요?
